questionHtml:
Which trend is correct, going down group 1?

A.  Melting point increases

B.  Reactivity decreases

C.  First ionisation energy increases

D.  Electronegativity decreases

meta.title: Which trend is correct, going down group 1? A. Melting point increases B. Reactivity decreases C. First ionisation energy increases D. Electronegativity decreases
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.3—Periodicity refers to trends in properties of elements across a period and down a group.
